eyebrow.en: Real estate and mortgage advice in the Netherlands

subtitle.nl: Deskundig advies bij het kopen van een woning, financiering en fiscale optimalisatie.
subtitle.en: Expert advice for buying property, arranging financing and optimizing tax matters.
subtitle.tr: Konut satın alma, finansman ve vergi optimizasyonu için uzman danışmanlık.

description.nl: Wij begeleiden u bij het kopen van vastgoed, het aanvragen van een hypotheek en het optimaliseren van uw fiscale positie.
description.en: We guide you in purchasing property, arranging a mortgage and optimizing your tax position.
description.tr: Gayrimenkul satın alma, mortgage başvurusu ve vergi pozisyonunuzun optimize edilmesi süreçlerinde size rehberlik ediyoruz.

location.nl: Voor kopers en investeerders in Amsterdam en heel Nederland.
location.en: For home buyers and investors throughout the Netherlands.
location.tr: Amsterdam ve tüm Hollanda'daki alıcılar ve yatırımcılar için.

quote.nl: Dankzij Unit AA kochten wij met vertrouwen onze eerste woning en kregen we duidelijk inzicht in alle fiscale gevolgen.
quote.en: Thanks to Unit AA, we purchased our first home with confidence and had a clear understanding of the tax implications.
quote.tr: Unit AA sayesinde ilk evimizi güvenle satın aldık ve tüm vergi sonuçlarını net bir şekilde anladık.

shortDesc.nl: Advies bij aankoop, financiering en fiscale optimalisatie van vastgoed.
shortDesc.en: Advice on purchasing, financing and tax optimization of real estate.
shortDesc.tr: Gayrimenkul satın alma, finansman ve vergi optimizasyonu danışmanlığı.

children.text: Wilt u een woning kopen of investeren in vastgoed? Unit AA begeleidt u bij het volledige traject: van aankoopadvies en hypotheekbegeleiding tot fiscale optimalisatie en rendementanalyse.
Planning to buy a home or invest in real estate? Unit AA supports you throughout the process, from acquisition and mortgage advice to tax optimization and return analysis.
Ev satın almak veya gayrimenkule yatırım yapmak mı istiyorsunuz? Unit AA, satın alma danışmanlığından mortgage desteğine, vergi optimizasyonundan getiri analizine kadar tüm süreçte yanınızdadır.

priceNote.nl: Afhankelijk van de complexiteit van het traject.
priceNote.en: Depending on the complexity of the project.

includedTitle.nl: Alles wat u nodig heeft voor een slimme vastgoedbeslissing.
includedTitle.en: Everything you need to make a smart real estate decision.
includedTitle.tr: Doğru gayrimenkul kararı için ihtiyacınız olan her şey.

includedSubtitle.nl: Volledige begeleiding van aankoop tot financiering.
includedSubtitle.en: Complete support from purchase to financing.
includedSubtitle.tr: Satın almadan finansmana kadar eksiksiz destek.

description.nl: Beoordeling van prijs, rendement en risico.
description.en: Assessment of price, return and risk.
Insight into financing options and monthly payments.
description.tr: Finansman seçenekleri ve aylık ödemeler hakkında bilgi.

description.nl: Advies over box 1, box 3 en BV-structuren.
description.en: Advice on Box 1, Box 3 and corporate structures.
description.tr: Box 1, Box 3 ve BV yapıları hakkında danışmanlık.

description.nl: Inzicht in netto rendement en cashflow.
description.en: Insight into net return and cash flow.
description.tr: Net getiri ve nakit akışı analizi.

description.nl: Koop privé of via BV? Wij adviseren de beste structuur.
description.en: Buy privately or through a company? We advise the best structure.
description.tr: Bireysel mi yoksa şirket üzerinden mi alınmalı? En uygun yapıyı belirleriz.

description.nl: Direct contact met een ervaren adviseur.
description.en: Direct contact with an experienced advisor.

includedFootnote.nl: Inclusief persoonlijke begeleiding en fiscaal advies op maat.
includedFootnote.en: Including personal guidance and tailored tax advice.
includedFootnote.tr: Kişisel rehberlik ve size özel vergi danışmanlığı dahildir.

benefitsTitle.nl: Zekerheid bij een van de grootste financiële beslissingen.
benefitsTitle.en: Confidence in one of your biggest financial decisions.
benefitsTitle.tr: Hayatınızdaki en önemli finansal kararlardan birinde güven.

benefitsSubtitle.nl: Wij combineren financiële expertise, fiscale kennis en persoonlijke begeleiding.
benefitsSubtitle.en: We combine financial expertise, tax knowledge and personal guidance.
benefitsSubtitle.tr: Finansal uzmanlığı, vergi bilgisini ve kişisel rehberliği bir araya getiriyoruz.

description.nl: Wij analyseren risico's en fiscale gevolgen vooraf.
description.en: We analyze risks and tax consequences in advance.
description.tr: Riskleri ve vergi sonuçlarını önceden analiz ederiz.

description.nl: Inzicht in cashflow, rendement en fiscale voordelen.
description.en: Insight into cash flow, returns and tax benefits.
description.tr: Nakit akışı, getiri ve vergi avantajları hakkında bilgi.

description.nl: Advies over privé aankoop of aankoop via BV.
description.en: Advice on private purchase or purchase through a company.
description.tr: Bireysel veya şirket üzerinden satın alma danışmanlığı.

processTitle.en: How we guide your real estate journey.

processSubtitle.nl: Van eerste analyse tot definitieve aankoop.
processSubtitle.en: From initial analysis to final purchase.

description.nl: We bespreken uw plannen, budget en doelen.
description.en: We discuss your plans, budget and goals.

description.nl: Wij beoordelen financiering, fiscale aspecten en rendement.
description.en: We analyze financing, tax aspects and returns.
description.tr: Finansman, vergi ve getiri analizini yaparız.

description.nl: U ontvangt een helder en onderbouwd advies.
description.en: You receive a clear and well-founded recommendation.
description.tr: Size net ve gerekçeli bir öneri sunarız.

description.nl: Wij begeleiden u tot en met de aankoop en financiering.
description.en: We support you through purchase and financing.
description.tr: Satın alma ve finansman süreci boyunca yanınızdayız.

faqSubtitle.nl: Antwoorden op de meest gestelde vragen over vastgoed en hypotheekadvies.
faqSubtitle.en: Answers to common questions about real estate and mortgage advice.
faqSubtitle.tr: Gayrimenkul ve mortgage danışmanlığı hakkında sık sorulan sorular.

question.nl: Kan ik beter privé of via een BV kopen?
question.en: Should I buy privately or through a company?
question.tr: Gayrimenkulü bireysel mi yoksa şirket üzerinden mi almalıyım?

children.text: Dat hangt af van uw situatie, rendement en fiscale doelstellingen. Wij analyseren beide opties en adviseren de meest voordelige structuur.
This depends on your situation, expected returns and tax objectives. We compare both options and advise the most beneficial structure.
Bu, durumunuza, getiri beklentinize ve vergi hedeflerinize bağlıdır. Her iki seçeneği analiz ederek en avantajlı yapıyı öneririz.

ctaTitle.en: Make real estate decisions with confidence.

ctaDescription.nl: Ontdek wat fiscaal en financieel de slimste keuze is voor uw vastgoedplannen.
ctaDescription.en: Discover the smartest financial and tax strategy for your real estate plans.
ctaDescription.tr: Gayrimenkul planlarınız için en avantajlı finansal ve vergi stratejisini öğrenin.

seoTitle.en: Real Estate & Mortgage Advice | Unit AA
seoTitle.tr: Gayrimenkul ve Mortgage Danışmanlığı | Unit AA

seoDescription.nl: Deskundig vastgoed- en hypotheekadvies voor kopers en investeerders. Inclusief fiscale optimalisatie, rendementsanalyse en persoonlijke begeleiding.
seoDescription.en: Expert real estate and mortgage advice for buyers and investors, including tax optimization, return analysis and personal guidance.
seoDescription.tr: Alıcılar ve yatırımcılar için uzman gayrimenkul ve mortgage danışmanlığı. Vergi optimizasyonu, getiri analizi ve kişisel rehberlik dahildir.
